Name: Inefficient regular expression
Description: A regular expression that may take exponential time on certain inputs.
Message: This part of the regular expression may cause exponential backtracking.

Name: SQL injection
Description: Data from an untrusted source reaches a SQL query without sanitization.
Message: User-controlled data is used in a SQL query.

Name: Hard-coded credentials
Description: Hard-coded password or token detected in source code.
